intent: Write a 'gifts for a friend who just moved into their first apartment' guide with a $100 cap. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse home-kitchen, office-products, and health-household and collect at least 4 gift-appropriate products under $40 each. Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/AskReddit AND /f/LifeProTips for posts on 'best housewarming gift' or 'gift that solved a problem'. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) table the 4 storefront candidates, (b) match each to a community-validated use case, (c) propose a 2-item bundle under $100, (d) close with a note card template. Cite every claim.
